nodes.label: Dual-format SSE Detection
nodes.rationale: Option A: frontend tries JSON.parse({env,line}) on each SSE message and falls back to plain-line parsing via parseEnvSections. Chosen so the UI can ship frontend-first against the current plain-line backend stream, and when the Go backend later emits structured JSON SSE the frontend picks it up automatically with no further changes.

nodes.label: STS Auth Badge Component
nodes.rationale: Topnav pill with checking/ok/fail states showing AWS SSO session validity; persists last known state to localStorage to avoid flashing, then re-checks after ~900ms. Pixel-port spec rewires it from localStorage simulation to the real awsApi identity call.

nodes.label: tf9-repo-overrides localStorage Contract (useRepoOverrides)
nodes.rationale: Per-target {disabled, group} overrides keyed by repo:target stored in localStorage key tf9-repo-overrides. Used because the redesign pass forbade changing the config.yaml schema or backend; the pixel-port spec keeps it as one of the two intentional localStorage contracts (alongside tf9-color-mode).

nodes.label: PipelineView Component Spec
nodes.rationale: Horizontal swim-lane group view of repo targets; effective group = localStorage override or first directory segment (a deliberate behavior change from the existing toGroupRows which used the last segment). Env dot colors by name heuristic: prod=red, staging=amber, global=purple, dev=green.

nodes.label: FullscreenTerminal Component Spec
nodes.rationale: Full-page terminal overlay with decorative macOS traffic lights, clipboard Copy, and Blob-based Download named {command}-{env}.txt; closes via Esc, backdrop click, or button.

edges.source_location: PipelineView spec derived from prototype Repositories pipeline view
FullscreenTerminal spec matches prototype fsOverlay modal (traffic lights, Copy, Download)
dual-format handler feeds the split panel's per-env terminal views
